name: Dried Tomato Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Start this dressing 6-12 hours before you want to use it on a salad.
2. Break the dried tomatoes into small pieces and place them in a ceramic bowl.
3. Pour just enough vinegar over the tomato pieces to barely cover them.
4. Crumble the dried herbs (basil, thyme, rosemary) over the tomatoes.
5. Mix the herbs with the tomatoes.
6. Add the olive oil and stir until well combined.
7. Place the dressing in the refrigerator and let it marinate for a few hours, stirring occasionally.
8. Use the dressing to dress your salad (e.g., romaine lettuce). You can add anise slices and orange pieces if desired.
9. Serve over a simple green salad without celery, carrots, or green peppers.
